title: Modi says Trinamool prevented passage of women’s reservation Bill; Mamata reminds him it was passed in 2023
description: The Prime Minister addresses four public meetings in Bankura, Purulia, Jhargram and Paschim Medinipur and calls the Trinamool ‘anti-tribal’. The Chief Minister hits back, citing raids at Kolkata police officer in charge of her security and asks whether there is a plan to eliminate her
